changes.reason: New high-value iPhone/iPad App crash and not-opening symptom cluster with current Apple China support sources; no existing canonical article covers this intent.

queries: App 停止响应 意外关闭 无法打开
app crashing not opening iPhone iPad
canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical articles cover App Store download/update failures, Safari, device touch unresponsiveness, and network failures. They do not cover a single iPhone/iPad app stopping responding, quitting unexpectedly, or failing to open; this article links to those adjacent topics for triage.
